calendar.matters:
Petitioner Tavistocktree, Llc'S Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: EDMOND PAK, RESPONDENT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: THE COURT AND RESPONDENT CONFER. THE COURT GRANTS Petitioner Tavistocktree, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights. (Counsel for plaintiff to prepare a form of order mirroring the court's ruling and email to court for signature). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Petitioner Tavistocktree, Llc'S Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Sep-27-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Z. Shafai, esq., Law Offices of John Z. Shafai, 310.788.2889, for Petitioner Tavistock Tree, LLC.
Edmond pak, Respondent in pro per.

RULING: The court, counsel and respondent confer. at conclusion of discussion, the court continues PETITIONER TAVISTOCKTREE, LLC's Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights for further hearing to september 27, 2012 at 9:30 am in department 302. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
